CustomField.description: Controls the depth of the audit trail persisted during agent execution. None skips all ExecutionStep records for synchronous SingleShot executions. Standard writes LLM calls, tool calls, and results. Full adds a curated decision timeline for Storyboard visualization.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: None: no ExecutionStep records for synchronous SingleShot executions. Standard: LLM calls, tool calls, and results persisted (default). Full: Standard plus Storyboard visualization.
CustomField.label: Audit Level
